---
title: "Using the MAb Metadata, Sequences, and Alignments"
author: "Jason Taylor"
date: "2023-06-21"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Using the MAb Metadata, Sequences, and Alignments}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

<style>
table {
    max-width: 100%;
    max-height: 600px;
    overflow: scroll;
}
thead{
    position: sticky;
    top: 0px;
    background-color: #fff;
}
</style>



## Purpose

The purpose of this feature is to offer users sequences and sequence alignments precomputed from V-Quest and IgBLAST.

## Our sources

The sequences presented here have been aquired from the Los Alamos National Laboratory (LANL) and select publications.

## Usage caveats

STUB

## Understanding the `mabMetadata` object

## Tutorial for using sequence and alignment data

Connect to DataSpace via the R API.


```r
library(DataSpaceR)
con <- connectDS()
```

Access metadata for a subset of neutralizing antibody assay (NAb) data...


```r

con$filterMabGrid("mab_mixture", "VRC01")
mab <- con$getMab()
mab$mabMetadata$loadAlignments()
met <- mab$mabMetadata
met
#> <DataSpaceMabMetadata>
#>   URL: https://dataspace-staging.cavd.org
#>   User: jmtaylor@fredhutch.org
#>   Summary:
#>     - 1 mabs
#>   MAbs in metadata: 
#>      VRC01
#>   MAb sequences available:
#>      VRC01
#>   MAb sequences loaded:
#>      VRC01
```

...or from all available metadata.


```r

met <- con$getMabMetadata()
met$loadAlignments()
met 
#> <DataSpaceMabMetadata>
#>   URL: https://dataspace-staging.cavd.org
#>   User: jmtaylor@fredhutch.org
#>   Summary:
#>     - 932 mabs
#>   MAbs in metadata: 
#>      PGT128, 4E10, AB-000440-1, AB-000441-1, AB-000442-1, AB-000443-1, AB-0...
#>   MAb sequences available:
#>      PGT128, b12, PGDM1400, PG16, CH27, CH28, CH31, CH58, CH59, PG9, PGT121...
#>   MAb sequences loaded:
#>      PGT128, b12, PGDM1400, PG16, CH27, CH28, CH31, CH58, CH59, PG9, PGT121...
```

As shown above, the metadata object does not contain sequences and alignments by default but must be loaded to the object manually.

The `loadAlignements` method can also take a charactor vector argument of which mAbs to load sequences and alignments for. In the example below we load sequence and alignment data for all the mAbs where `mab_donor_clade` is listed as `A`.


```r

met <- con$getMabMetadata()
mabIds <- met$mabMetadata[mab_donor_clade == "A" & sequence_available == TRUE, mab_id]
met$loadAlignments(mabIds)
met 
#> <DataSpaceMabMetadata>
#>   URL: https://dataspace-staging.cavd.org
#>   User: jmtaylor@fredhutch.org
#>   Summary:
#>     - 932 mabs
#>   MAbs in metadata: 
#>      PGT128, 4E10, AB-000440-1, AB-000441-1, AB-000442-1, AB-000443-1, AB-0...
#>   MAb sequences available:
#>      PGT128, b12, PGDM1400, PG16, CH27, CH28, CH31, CH58, CH59, PG9, PGT121...
#>   MAb sequences loaded:
#>      CH31, PGT121, PGT123, CH01, PGC14, VRC-CH30, VRC-CH32, VRC-CH33, VRC-C...
```

Once sequences and alignments are loaded, there are several active bindings available to access those data:


```
#>          mab_id sequence_id locus
#>  1: cds_mab_224  cds_seq_82   IGH
#>  2: cds_mab_224  cds_seq_83   IGK
#>  3:  cds_mab_26 cds_seq_108   IGH
#>  4:  cds_mab_26 cds_seq_109   IGL
#>  5:  cds_mab_27 cds_seq_112   IGH
#>  6:  cds_mab_27 cds_seq_113   IGL
#>  7: cds_mab_332 cds_seq_143   IGK
#>  8: cds_mab_332 cds_seq_144   IGH
#>  9: cds_mab_636  cds_seq_60   IGH
#> 10: cds_mab_636  cds_seq_61   IGL
#> 11: cds_mab_641  cds_seq_80   IGH
#> 12: cds_mab_641  cds_seq_81   IGK
#> 13: cds_mab_642  cds_seq_84   IGH
#> 14: cds_mab_642  cds_seq_85   IGK
#> 15: cds_mab_643  cds_seq_86   IGH
#> 16: cds_mab_643  cds_seq_87   IGK
#> 17: cds_mab_644  cds_seq_88   IGH
#> 18: cds_mab_644  cds_seq_89   IGK
#> 19: cds_mab_651 cds_seq_110   IGL
#> 20: cds_mab_651 cds_seq_111   IGH
#> 21: cds_mab_657 cds_seq_141   IGK
#> 22: cds_mab_657 cds_seq_142   IGH
#> 23: cds_mab_658 cds_seq_145   IGK
#> 24: cds_mab_658 cds_seq_146   IGH
#> 25: cds_mab_659 cds_seq_147   IGK
#> 26: cds_mab_659 cds_seq_148   IGH
#> 27: cds_mab_669 cds_seq_171   IGL
#> 28: cds_mab_669 cds_seq_172   IGH
#> 29: cds_mab_670 cds_seq_173   IGH
#> 30: cds_mab_670 cds_seq_174   IGL
#> 31: cds_mab_690 cds_seq_225   IGH
#> 32: cds_mab_690 cds_seq_226   IGL
#>          mab_id sequence_id locus
#>                                                                                                                      header
#>  1: VRC-CH31_JN159435_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH31_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  2: VRC-CH31_JN159438_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH31_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  3:       PGT121_JN201894_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGT121_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  4:       PGT121_JN201911_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGT121_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  5:       PGT123_JN201896_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGT123_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  6:       PGT123_JN201913_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGT123_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  7:          CH01_JQ267519_Homo_sapiens_isolate_CH01_anti-HIV1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  8:          CH01_JQ267523_Homo_sapiens_isolate_CH01_anti-HIV1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#>  9:         PGC14_GU272051_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGC14_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 10:         PGC14_GU272052_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGC14_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 11: VRC-CH30_JN159434_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH30_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 12: VRC-CH30_JN159437_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH30_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 13: VRC-CH32_JN159436_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH32_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 14: VRC-CH32_JN159439_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH32_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 15: VRC-CH33_JN159472_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH33_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 16: VRC-CH33_JN159470_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH33_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 17: VRC-CH34_JN159473_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH34_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 18: VRC-CH34_JN159471_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-CH34_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 19:       PGT122_JN201912_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGT122_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 20:       PGT122_JN201895_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGT122_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 21:          CH04_JQ267522_Homo_sapiens_isolate_CH04_anti-HIV1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 22:          CH04_JQ267526_Homo_sapiens_isolate_CH04_anti-HIV1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 23:          CH02_JQ267520_Homo_sapiens_isolate_CH02_anti-HIV1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 24:          CH02_JQ267524_Homo_sapiens_isolate_CH02_anti-HIV1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds

#> 26:          CH03_JQ267525_Homo_sapiens_isolate_CH03_anti-HIV1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 27: VRC-PG19_KF515515_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-PG19_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 28: VRC-PG19_KF515516_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-PG19_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds
#> 29: VRC-PG20_KF515514_Homo_sapiens_isolate_VRC-PG20_anti-HIV-1_immunoglobulin_heavy_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds

#> 32:     PGT124_KM507480_Homo_sapiens_isolate_PGT124LC_anti-HIV_immunoglobulin_light_chain_variable_region_mRNA,_partial_cds

#>                     source
#>  1: LANL Sequence Database
#>  2: LANL Sequence Database

#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          sequence_nt
#>  1:

#>  3:

#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          sequence_nt
#>            mab_id mab_name_std mab_lanlid sequence_id locus stop_codon
#>    1: cds_mab_332         CH01       2655 cds_seq_143   IGK          F
#>    2: cds_mab_332         CH01       2655 cds_seq_143   IGK          F

#>    5: cds_mab_332         CH01       2655 cds_seq_143   IGK          F
#>   ---                                                                 
#> 2333: cds_mab_644     VRC-CH34       2577  cds_seq_89   IGK          F
#> 2334: cds_mab_669     VRC-PG19       3015 cds_seq_171   IGL          F
#> 2335: cds_mab_669     VRC-PG19       3015 cds_seq_172   IGH          F
#> 2336: cds_mab_670     VRC-PG20       3017 cds_seq_173   IGH          F
#> 2337: cds_mab_670     VRC-PG20       3017 cds_seq_174   IGL          F
#>       vj_in_frame productive rev_comp complete_vdj      v_call      d_call
#>    1:           T          T        F            T IGKV3-20*01        <NA>
#>    2:           T          T        F            T IGKV3-20*01        <NA>
#>    3:           T          T        F            T IGKV3-20*01        <NA>

#>   ---                                                                     
#> 2333:           T          T        F            T IGKV1-33*01        <NA>
#> 2334:           T          T        F            T IGLV2-14*03        <NA>
#> 2335:           T          T        F            T  IGHV1-2*02 IGHD6-25*01
#> 2336:           T          T        F            T  IGHV1-2*02 IGHD3-10*01
#> 2337:           T          T        F            T IGLV2-14*03        <NA>
#>         j_call
#>    1: IGKJ1*01
#>    2: IGKJ2*01
#>    3: IGKJ2*03
#>    4: IGKJ4*01
#>    5: IGKJ4*02
#>   ---         
#> 2333: IGKJ2*01
#> 2334: IGLJ2*01
#> 2335: IGHJ1*01
#> 2336: IGHJ1*01
#> 2337: IGLJ2*01
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           sequence_alignment
#>    1:                                                                  
#>    2:                                                                  
#>    3:                                                                  
#>    4:                                                                  
#>    5:                                                                  
#>   ---                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
#> 2333:                                  GACATCCAGATGACCCAGTCTCCATCGTCCTTGTCTGCATCACTCGGAGACAGAGTCACCATCACTTGCCAGGCGAGCCGGGGTATT..................GGTAAAGATTTAAATTGGTACCAACAGAAAGCGGGAAAAGCCCCTAAGTTACTGGTCTCTGATGCA.....................TCCATTTTGGAAGGGGGGGTCCCA...TCAAGGTTCAGCGGGAGTGGA......TTTCACCAAAATTTTAGTCTGACCATCTCCAGCCTGCAGCCTGAAGATGTTGCGACCTATTTCTGTCAGCAGTACGAGACTTTTGGCCAGGGGACCAAGGTGGACATCAAA
#> 2334:                                 CAGTCTGCCCTGACTCAGCCTGCCTCC...GTGTCTGGGTCGCCTGGACAGTCGATCACCATCTCCTGCACT...GCAAGCAGCGACTTTCGT.........GGTTTTTCCTCTGTCTCCTGGTACCAGCAAGTCCCGGGCCGGGCCCCCAAACTTCTTATTTTTAGTGTC.....................AATAGACGACCCTCGGGGATTTCT...CATCGCTTCTCTGGCTCCAAG......TCTGGCAACACGGCCTCCCTGACCATCTCTGGGCTCCAGATTGAAGACGAGGCTGATTATCACTGTAATGCATATGAATTTTTCGGCGGCGGGACCAAGGTCTTCGTCCTTG
#> 2335:       GAGGTGCGTCTGGTGCAATCTGGGGCT...GAAGTGAAGAAGCCTGGGGCATCAGTGAGGGTCTCCTGTGCGGCATCTGGATATACGTTC............ACCGACTTCGACATACACTGGCTGCGCCAGGCCCCCGGAAGAGGGCTTGAGTGGATGGGGTGGGTGAGGCCTCTG......GGAGGTGGCGTCAGTTATGCACGCCAGTTTCAG...GGCAGGGTCACTATGACCAGGGACTTCTACATCGACACAGCCTTTATGGACTTCAGGAATTTAAAAATGGACGACACGGCCCTCTACTTCTGTGCGAGAATGGGGGCGGCTCGGGAGTGGGACTTCCAGTACTGGGGCCAGGGCACCCGGGTCCTCGTCTCCTCA
#> 2336: CAAGTGCATTTAATGCAGTCTGGGACT...GAAATGAAGAAGCCTGGGGCCTCAGTGAGGGTCACCTGTCAGACTTCTGGATACACCTTC............AGCGACTACTTCATCCACTGGTTGCGACAAGTCCCCGGTCGAGGATTTGAGTGGATGGGTTGGATGAACCCTCAA......TGGGGTCAAGTCAACTATGCACGGACATTTCAG...GGAAGAGTCACGATGACAAGAGACGTTTATAGGGAAGTTGCTTACTTGGACCTGAGGAGCCTGACATTTGCCGACACGGCCGTCTATTTCTGTGCGAGAAGAATGAGGTCCCAGGACCGCGAGTGGGACTTCCAGCACTGGGGCCAGGGCACCCGGATCATCGTTTCGTCA

#>    4:                                                                  
#>    5:

#>   ---                                                                                                                                   
#> 2333:            DIQMTQSPSSLSASLGDRVTITCQASRGI......GKDLNWYQQKAGKAPKLLVSDA.......SILEGGVP.SRFSGSG..FHQNFSLTISSLQPEDVATYFCQQYETFGQGTKVDIK

#> 2337:            QSALTQPPS.VSGSPGQSITLSCTGA.........STSVAWYQQYADKAPRLIVFDG.......NKRPSDIS.SRFSGSQ..SGGTASLTISGLQSEDEAYYHCNAFEFFGGGTKLTVL
#>                                                                                                                   germline_alignment_aa
#>    1:                      EIVLTQSPGTLSLSPGERATLSCRASQSVSSSYLAWYQQKPGQAPRLLIYGASSRATGIPDRFSGSGSGTDFTLTISRLEPEDFAVYYCQQYGSSPXTFGQGTKVEIK
#>    2:                      EIVLTQSPGTLSLSPGERATLSCRASQSVSSSYLAWYQQKPGQAPRLLIYGASSRATGIPDRFSGSGSGTDFTLTISRLEPEDFAVYYCQQYGSSPYTFGQGTKLEIK

#>    run_application    run_information
#> 1:         IgBLAST  <data.frame[5x2]>
#> 2:         V-Quest <data.frame[10x2]>
```
 
Descriptons for the various fields in each of these objects can be found using the `variableDefinitions` active binding.


```
#>           query_name        field_name           caption description
#>   1:     mabMetadata         container            Folder        <NA>
#>   2:     mabMetadata            mab_id            Mab Id        <NA>
#>   3:     mabMetadata      mab_name_std      Mab Name Std        <NA>
#>   4:     mabMetadata        mab_lanlid        Mab Lanlid        <NA>
#>   5:     mabMetadata mab_hxb2_location Mab Hxb2 Location        <NA>
#>  ---                                                                
#> 132: alleleSequences      release_date      Release Date        <NA>
#> 133: alleleSequences         container            Folder        <NA>
#> 134:  runInformation   run_application   Run Application        <NA>
#> 135:  runInformation   run_information   Run Information        <NA>
#> 136:  runInformation         container            Folder        <NA>
```
